name: OneCoin
description: In a market oversaturated with trillion-supply meme tokens and inflationary models that decay value over time, OneCoin introduces a radically different approach: a total supply of exactly one token. This is not just a design choice — it is a philosophical stance against the dilution and noise dominating the crypto landscape. With a single-token supply, scarcity is no longer theoretical or symbolic; it becomes absolute, measurable, and immutable.
